'''''Laantis''''' was an [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] that saw service with the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Navy]].

==History==
The warship was to receive a new [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] system from the [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighter]] ''[[Rasvin]]''. During that time it had to power down to allow the freighter to board. Before the operation commenced the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] sent a strike force, consisting of [[RZ-1 A-wing interceptor/Legends|A-wings]], [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-Wings]], [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]] and [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]], two [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|shuttles]] [[Silver (shuttles)|''Silver'']], two [[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport]]s [[Logan (transports)|''Logan'']] and two [[CR90 corvette/Legends|corvettes]] ''[[Glaser]]'' and [[Chiller (CR90 corvette)|''Chiller'']] attacked the '''Laantis''' knowing it would be vulnerable during the refit. However, the attack failed as the frigate was defended not just by [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE Fighters]], [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|Bombers]] and [[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|Interceptors]], it was also defended by [[TIE/Advanced starfighter|TIE Advanced starfighters]] after the attack was defeated the ''Laantis'' successfully received its new hyperdrive.

The incident was then recorded into the [[Combat chamber]] for future simulation training missions to train future [[TIE pilot|pilots]], one of them was [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]].

==Behind the scenes==
The '''Laantis''' appears in the [[1994]] PC game ''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'' in the 4th training mission for the [[TIE/Advanced starfighter|TIE Advanced]] called "Hyperdrive Upgrade". This article assumes "Medium" difficulty. In "Hard" difficulty, not only does the player fight more fighters, ''Silver'' is replaced with 4 [[Delta-class JV-7 escort shuttle]]s ''[[Jackal]]'', Logan's flight group increases to 4 and a third corvette called ''[[Spartzen]]'' enters the battle.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']] {{1st}} {{C|Simulator appearance only}}
